_publications._publicationTitle: Epigenomic, genomic, and transcriptomic landscape of schwannomatosis.

_contextSnippet: a statistically significantly higher proportion of SWNTS-SWNs harbored deletions in this region compared to NS-SWNs (80% vs. 30%, Chi-square, p < 0.01)
details: Successfully detected that 80% of SWNTS-SWNs harbored deletions in chromosome 22q11-q13 region compared to 30% of NS-SWNs, with statistically significant difference
